Why Choose Us

Why Guests Love Staying Here

💸
Honest Pricing
No hidden charges, no surprises. ₹400 for Non-AC and ₹600 for AC — that's it. Transparent always.
🧹
Clean Every Day
Rooms are cleaned and freshened daily. We take cleanliness seriously so you can rest comfortably.
📍
Great Location
Located in Kalakar Colony near Cinema Hall — easy access to Jaisalmer's markets, temples & attractions.
🙏
Pilgrims Welcome
A respectful, alcohol-free, smoke-free environment. Safe and peaceful for individuals, couples & families.
📞
24/7 Support
Our reception is open around the clock. Check-in anytime — no fixed arrival time, we're always here.
💬
Book Instantly
One tap on WhatsApp or a quick phone call and your room is confirmed. No complicated booking process.

House Rules

Rules & Guidelines

For the comfort and safety of every guest, please follow these simple rules.

🪪
Aadhaar Card Mandatory
Original Aadhaar Card is the only ID accepted at check-in. No exceptions.
⏰
Check-out by 10:00 AM
Check-in anytime. Check-out is at 10:00 AM. Late check-out on request.
🚭
No Smoking
Strictly prohibited inside all rooms and common areas of the property.
🍺
No Alcohol
Alcohol and intoxicants are not permitted anywhere on the premises.
👨‍👩‍👧
Family Environment
Respectful behaviour expected at all times. Family-friendly premises only.
🔇
Quiet After 10 PM
Please keep noise levels low after 10:00 PM to respect all guests.
🧹
Keep Rooms Clean
Housekeeping done daily. Please do not damage property or litter.
🐾
No Pets Allowed
Pets are not permitted anywhere on the premises. We apologise.
